features.title: 5-mode power sequencing
features.user_visible_behavior: Sensor cycles through FULL/PCUT/NCUT/EXTR/FCYC modes automatically
features.verification: 1. Program board 2. Capture UART frames 3. Check MODE field cycles through all 5
features.evidence: V6.3 bitstream generated, v63_* capture logs show 5 modes

features.title: 128-point dual-channel capture
features.user_visible_behavior: Each trigger produces 128 samples on both CH1 and CH2
features.verification: 1. Check CSV has 128 values per channel 2. Verify CH1/CH2 data correlation

features.title: UART ASCII frame output (1 Mbps)
features.user_visible_behavior: ASCII frames: header + CH1/CH2 raw 128x4-hex, no binary garbage
features.verification: 1. capture_ascii_v60.py parses header 2. CH1/CH2 regex matches 3. No UART framing errors
features.evidence: capture_ascii_v60.py parses correctly, v63 logs clean

features.title: LCD version/mode display
features.user_visible_behavior: LCD shows V6.3 and current mode name
features.verification: Visual inspection of LCD during capture cycle

features.title: Harness (simplified V6.3)
features.verification: 1. check passes 2. build runs 3. program connects 4. capture parses

features.title: Capture analysis pipeline
features.user_visible_behavior: Contrastive learning, t-SNE/PCA visualizations, sensor identification
features.verification: 1. Run analysis scripts 2. Check separation metrics 3. Verify identification accuracy
